items.caption: A slide with a title "cumulus clouds" in bold blue letters at the top. below the title, there are three bullet points providing information about cumulus clouds. the first bullet point states that cumulus clouds are puffy and resemble the ones drawn in first grade. the second bullet point is "fair weather clouds," indicating that cumulus clouds are typically associated with fair weather conditions. the background of the slide features a photograph of a blue sky with cumulus clouds, which are fluffy and white, scattered across the sky. the clouds are set against a clear blue backdrop, emphasizing their puffy nature. the overall style of the image is educational and informative, likely used in a presentation or educational setting to explain the characteristics of cumulus clouds.
